---
title: "{{< meta course_title >}}"
deck_short_title: "{{< meta decks.d03.short_title >}}"
subtitle: |
  <span class="deck-title">{{< meta decks.d03.title >}}</span><br>
  <span class="deck-meta">{{< meta texts.cb.short >}} Ch. 8<br> 
  </span>
---

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/hypothesis/hypothesis-frame.qmd >}}


{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/hypothesis/hypothesis-examples.qmd >}}


{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/hypothesis/likelihoodratio.qmd >}}

## Proof of the NeymanŌĆōPearson lemma (simple vs simple)

$$
H_0:\theta=\theta_0,
\qquad
H_A:\theta=\theta_1
$$

Let densities under these two hypotheses be $\varrho_0$ and $\varrho_1$

Among all tests with size $\alpha$,

::: {.key-point}
The likelihood ratio test is most powerful
:::

Given data $\vX = (X_1, \ldots, X_n)$, reject $H_0$ when
$$
\frac{\varrho_1(\vX)}{\varrho_0(\vX)} > k, \qquad \text{i.e. } \varrho_1(\vX) - k \varrho_0(\vX) > 0
$$

where $k$ is chosen so that
$$
\Prob_{\theta_0}(\text{Reject}) = \alpha
$$

---

### Proof by comparison argument

- Let $\phi^{\LRT}(\vX)$ be the likelihood ratio test, i.e., $\phi^{\LRT}(\vX) = \begin{cases} 1 & \text{if reject}, \varrho_1(\vX) - k \varrho_0(\vX) > 0 \\ 0 & \text{not reject} \end{cases}$

- Let $\phi(\vX)$ be any other test with $\Ex_{\theta_0}[\phi(\vX)] \le \alpha
=
\Ex_{\theta_0}[\phi^{\LRT}(\vX)]
$

Consider

$$
\int \bigl(\phi^{\LRT}(\vx) - \phi(\vx)\bigr)\bigl(\varrho_1(\vx) - k \varrho_0(\vx)\bigr)\, \dif \vx
$$

By construction of $\phi^{\LRT}$:

- If $\phi^{\LRT}(\vx)=1$ and $\phi(\vx)=0$, then $\varrho_1(\vx) - k\varrho_0(\vx) \ge 0$  
- If $\phi^{\LRT}(\vx)=0$ and $\phi(\vx)=1$, then $\varrho_1(\vx) - k\varrho_0(\vx) \le 0$

Hence

$$
\int \bigl(\phi^{\LRT}(\vx) - \phi(\vx)\bigr)\bigl(\varrho_1(\vx) - k \varrho_0(\vx)\bigr)\, \dif \vx \ge 0
$$

---

### Finishing the proof

Expand the inequality above:

$$
\int \bigl(\phi^{\LRT}(\vx) - \phi(\vx)\bigr)\varrho_1(\vx)\, \dif \vx  
-
k
\int \bigl(\phi^{\LRT}(\vx) - \phi(\vx)\bigr)\varrho_0(\vx)\, \dif \vx
\ge 0
$$

But

$$
\int \phi(\vx) \varrho_0(\vx)\, \dif \vx
=
\Ex_{\theta_0}[\phi]
\le
\Ex_{\theta_0}[\phi^{\LRT}]
=
\int \phi^{\LRT}(\vx) \varrho_0(\vx)\, \dif \vx
$$

so

$$
\int \bigl(\phi^{\LRT}(\vx) - \phi(\vx)\bigr)\varrho_0(\vx)\, \dif \vx \ge 0
$$

Therefore

$$
\int \phi^{\LRT}(\vx) \varrho_1(\vx)\, \dif \vx
\ge
\int \phi(\vx) \varrho_1(\vx)\, \dif \vx
$$

---

Thus,

\begin{multline*}
\power^{\phi^{\LRT}}(\theta_1) = \Ex_{\theta_1}[\phi^{\LRT}(\vX)] = \int \phi^{\LRT}(\vx) \varrho_1(\vx)\, \dif \vx
\\
\ge
\int \phi(\vx) \varrho_1(\vx)\, \dif \vx = \Ex_{\theta_1}[\phi(\vX)] = \power^{\phi}(\theta_1)
\end{multline*}


$\square$

&nbsp;

```{=html}
<div class="deck-nav">
  <a class="deck-prev" href="{{< meta decks.d02.file >}}">ŌåÉ {{< meta decks.d02.title >}}</a>
  <span class="deck-next deck-disabled"></span>
</div>
```
